span.p:
Is it IMMATERIAL (qualitative AND
quantitative; no fixed-pct bright line)?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Write the entire variance to COGS
(expense in period)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Driven by ABNORMAL causes?
(idle capacity, abnormal spoilage/freight,
gross inefficiency)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PRORATE across RM / WIP / FG / COGS
where the standard costs reside,
so ending inventory approximates actual cost
